languages.original_text: "You bestow too much importance on painted rags and pieces of metal. How can there be great meaning behind the urge to lay down your life for a trifle? Be glad that this platform is not arrayed with the bodies of those whose names you invoked."

languages.text: "Слишком много значения вы придаете раскрашенным тряпкам и кускам металла. Так ли наполнено смыслом стремление положить жизнь за безделицу? Радуйся, что на этой платформе не выставлены тела тех, чьи имена ты назвал".

"You bestow too much importance on painted rags and pieces of metal. How can there be great meaning behind the urge to lay down your life for a trifle? Be glad that this platform is not arrayed with the bodies of those whose names you invoked."
languages.original_text: "Слишком много значения вы придаете раскрашенным тряпкам и кускам металла. Так ли наполнено смыслом стремление положить жизнь за безделицу? Радуйся, что на этой платформе не выставлены тела тех, чьи имена ты назвал".

"You bestow too much importance on painted rags and pieces of metal. How can there be great meaning behind the urge to lay down your life for a trifle? Be glad that this platform is not arrayed with the bodies of those whose names you invoked."

"You bestow too much importance on painted rags and pieces of metal. How can there be great meaning behind the urge to lay down your life for a trifle? Be glad that this platform is not arrayed with the bodies of those whose names you invoked."

languages.text: 「あなたは、布に塗られた色や金属の切れ端に、あまりにも大きな意味を置いている。些細な物のために命を捧げたいという衝動の背後には、大きな意味があるのか。あなたが呼び出した人の名前を刻んだ遺体でこのプラットフォームが飾られていることを喜ぶのだ」
languages.original_text: "You bestow too much importance on painted rags and pieces of metal. How can there be great meaning behind the urge to lay down your life for a trifle? Be glad that this platform is not arrayed with the bodies of those whose names you invoked."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは、布に塗られた色や金属の切れ端に、あまりにも大きな意味を置いています。些細な物のために命を捧げたいという衝動の背後には、大きな意味があるのでしょうか。あなたが呼び出した人の名前を刻んだ遺体でこのプラットフォームが飾られていることを喜ぶのです。」

languages.text: « Vous accordez trop d'importance à des toiles peintes et à des morceaux de métal. Quel sens pouvez-vous bien donner au désir de risquer sa vie pour des bagatelles ? Estimez-vous heureux que cette plateforme ne soit pas jonchée des cadavres de ceux dont vous avez invoqué le nom. »
languages.original_text: "You bestow too much importance on painted rags and pieces of metal. How can there be great meaning behind the urge to lay down your life for a trifle? Be glad that this platform is not arrayed with the bodies of those whose names you invoked."

traits.locale_text: « Vous accordez trop d'importance à des toiles peintes et à des morceaux de métal. Quel sens pouvez-vous bien donner au désir de risquer sa vie pour des bagatelles ? Estimez-vous heureux que cette plateforme ne soit pas jonchée des cadavres de ceux dont vous avez invoqué le nom. »

languages.text: "Ihr messt bemalten Lumpen und Metallstücken eine zu große Wichtigkeit zu. Welche höhere Bedeutung kann hinter dem Drang stehen, sein Leben für eine Bagatelle hinzugeben? Seid froh, dass diese Plattform nicht mit den Leichen der Leute gespickt ist, deren Namen Ihr erwähnt habt."
languages.original_text: "You bestow too much importance on painted rags and pieces of metal. How can there be great meaning behind the urge to lay down your life for a trifle? Be glad that this platform is not arrayed with the bodies of those whose names you invoked."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr messt bemalten Lumpen und Metallstücken eine zu große Wichtigkeit zu. Welche höhere Bedeutung kann hinter dem Drang stehen, sein Leben für eine Bagatelle hinzugeben? Seid froh, dass diese Plattform nicht mit den Leichen der Leute gespickt ist, deren Namen Ihr erwähnt habt."

languages.text: "Boyalı paçavralara ve metal parçalarına çok fazla önem atfediyorsunuz. Bir hiç uğruna canını verme dürtüsünün arkasında nasıl büyük bir anlam olabilir? Bu platformun, isimlerini andığınız kişilerin cesetleriyle dolu olmadığına şükredin."
languages.original_text: "You bestow too much importance on painted rags and pieces of metal. How can there be great meaning behind the urge to lay down your life for a trifle? Be glad that this platform is not arrayed with the bodies of those whose names you invoked."

traits.locale_text: "Boyalı paçavralara ve metal parçalarına çok fazla önem atfediyorsunuz. Bir hiç uğruna canını verme dürtüsünün arkasında nasıl büyük bir anlam olabilir? Bu platformun, isimlerini andığınız kişilerin cesetleriyle dolu olmadığına şükredin."

languages.text: «Concedes demasiada importancia a unos trozos de metal y unos jirones de tela pintados. ¿Qué significado trascendental puede haber en el impulso de dar la vida por una baratija? Deberías alegrarte de que esta plataforma no esté decorada con los cadáveres de aquellos a quienes nombras».
languages.original_text: "You bestow too much importance on painted rags and pieces of metal. How can there be great meaning behind the urge to lay down your life for a trifle? Be glad that this platform is not arrayed with the bodies of those whose names you invoked."

traits.locale_text: «Concedes demasiada importancia a unos trozos de metal y unos jirones de tela pintados. ¿Qué significado trascendental puede haber en el impulso de dar la vida por una baratija? Deberías alegrarte de que esta plataforma no esté decorada con los cadáveres de aquellos a quienes nombras».

languages.text: “你们把那些彩布烂铁看得太重了。为一点破烂甘愿赴死，这能有什么崇高意义？这平台上没摆满你口中那些人的尸体，你就感到庆幸吧。”
languages.original_text: "You bestow too much importance on painted rags and pieces of metal. How can there be great meaning behind the urge to lay down your life for a trifle? Be glad that this platform is not arrayed with the bodies of those whose names you invoked."
